title: Fletcher (Fabric)
description: Adds Fletching Table functionality to Minecraft!
body:
# Fletcher
Fletcher is an advanced Fletching Table mod for Fabric servers, adding a custom GUI to Fletching Tables that lets you make a variety of different types of arrow.


This is the **Fabric** version of Fletcher. It must be installed on both the server and the client.

You can download the plugin version for PaperMC servers [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fletcher), which is only required on the server.

## Arrow Tips
The following items can be used as arrow tips:
- Flint - Makes a **Flint Arrow**, the default arrow
- Iron Nugget - Makes a **Weighted Arrow**, deals 2x damage but is not shot as far
- Gold Nugget - Makes a **Gilded Arrow**, deals 1.5x damage and flies further than Weighted Arrows but not as far as Flint Arrows, also breaks on impact
- Glowstone Dust - Makes a **Spectral Arrow**, similar to a flint arrow but gives the Glowing effect for 8 minutes on impact
- Echo Shard - Makes a **Sonic Arrow**, which deals splash damage (and draws the attention of nearby wardens)
- Ender Pearl - Makes a **Teleportation Arrow**, which teleports the shooter to where it lands, but hurts the shooter as if they were hit by it
- Slimeball - Makes a **Bouncy Arrow**, which deals no damage but pushes back the hit entity

## Arrow Hilts
- Stick - Default hilt, no effect
- Blaze Rod - Makes a **Blazing Arrow**, which is shot 2x as fast
- Breeze Rod - Makes a **Breezing Arrow**, which is less affected by gravity

## Feathers
You can use up to 3 feathers to boost the accuracy of an arrow.
- 1 feather is less accurate than vanilla
- 2 is the same as vanilla
- 3 is a perfectly straight shot

## Tipped Arrows
Only **Flint Arrows** can be turned into Tipped Arrows, using the Splash Potion slot in the Fletching Table.

## Infinity
All arrows except for Tipped Arrows work with Infinity.

This helps with balancing, as iron arrows deal less damage than Harming II arrows, encouraging players to try out various types of arrows.
